appSlogan: Deep understanding of Redis, starting from data structures!

viewMode.listTooltip: Display all data structures in list view
viewMode.pathTooltip: Display by learning path dependency, from simple to complex

animationTooltip.hasAnimation: This data structure has an interactive animation. Click to visit the demo site.
animationTooltip.noAnimation: This data structure has no interactive animation yet. Can't wait? Click to create an issue to speed it up!
animationTooltip.clickToView: Click to view full animation demo

resetProgress.tooltip: Clear all learning progress and start over
resetProgress.title: Confirm Restart?
resetProgress.message: This will clear all your learning progress, including completed data structure marks. This action cannot be undone.
resetProgress.success: Reset successful! All learning progress has been cleared. You can start learning again.

resetPathProgress.title: Confirm Restart This Category?
resetPathProgress.message: This will clear all learning progress for this category, including completed marks and earned experience points. This action cannot be undone.
resetPathProgress.success: Reset successful! Progress for this category has been cleared. You can start learning again.

clickBehavior.title: Node Click Behavior Settings
clickBehavior.description: Choose the default behavior when clicking a data structure node

animation.label: Animation Demo
animation.description: Open GitHub Pages animation demo site

none.label: No Action
none.description: Only select the node, no navigation
